# trigger_engine module constants
FILE_CHANGED_COOLDOWN_SECONDS = 300
HAS_DUCKDB = True

# trigger_engine public function / class signatures
TriggerResult(triggered: 'bool' = False, reason: 'str' = '', action: 'str' = '', message: 'str' = '', details: 'dict[str, Any]' = <factory>) -> None
clear_snooze() -> 'None'
detect_skill_changes() -> 'list[str]'
evaluate_corrections(state: 'dict[str, Any] | None' = None) -> 'TriggerResult'
evaluate_file_changed(file_path: 'str', *, state: 'dict[str, Any] | None' = None, project_dir: 'str | None' = None) -> 'TriggerResult'
evaluate_session_end(state: 'dict[str, Any] | None' = None, *, project_dir: 'str | None' = None) -> 'TriggerResult'
is_watched_file(file_path: 'str') -> 'str | None'
load_trigger_config(state: 'dict[str, Any] | None' = None) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
read_and_delete_pending_trigger() -> 'dict[str, Any] | None'
snooze_trigger(hours: 'float' = 24) -> 'None'
write_pending_trigger(result: 'TriggerResult') -> 'None'
